de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.settings

Class SettingsPanel

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • javax.swing.JComponent
          • javax.swing.JPanel
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.settings.SimpleSettingsPanel
              • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.settings.SettingsPanel
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, java.io.Serializable, javax.accessibility.Accessible
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ExtensionManager, SMTSettingsProvider, StandardUISettings, TacletTranslationOptions, TestgenOptionsPanel

    public abstract class SettingsPanel
extends SimpleSettingsPanel
    Extension of SimpleSettingsPanel which uses MigLayout to create a nice three-column view.

    Allows a simple building of the UI by defining several factory methods, e.g. addTextField(String, String, String, Validator)

    2019-04-08, weigl: rewrite to mig layout

    See Also:
    Serialized Form
